title: PolicyIssued
description: Event published when a policy transitions from DRAFT to ACTIVE (policy is issued).

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event instance.

partnerId.description: Identifier of the policyholder (references partner domain).

productId.description: Identifier of the insurance product (references product domain).

coverageStartDate.description: Coverage start date in ISO-8601 format (yyyy-MM-dd).

premium.description: Annual premium in CHF as a plain decimal string (e.g. '1234.50').

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the event was created.
